milestones: A solution.py file exists and is valid Python (parses without syntax errors)
User registration and profile management system is implemented with classes/functions supporting account creation, profile data (cultural backgrounds, interests), and profile picture handling
Virtual tour module is implemented with support for 3D cultural landmark exploration, interactive hotspots providing additional information, and audio guide functionality
Language learning and practice feature is implemented with user pairing for real-time language exchange and an integrated translation tool
Cultural workshop module is implemented supporting live and pre-recorded sessions with functionality for users to join, ask questions, and participate in discussions
User feedback and rating system is implemented allowing users to rate and review virtual tours, language exchanges, and workshops
